title: Stranger Waking
overview: Suddenly whisked to the magical world of Twisted-Wonderland, high schooler Yu wonders why he was even summoned. He has no magical abilities and is not even from this world. All he wants is to go back home, but he comes face-to-face with a fire-breathing monster instead.

title: A Dismissive Ranking
overview: Yu is given special permission to live and work at Night Raven College while he searches for a way back to his own world. Things seem to be going well for Yu as he settles into his new environment, until a familiar monster reappears with its fiery temper.

title: To the Enchanted Mine
overview: To reverse their expulsion, Ace and Deuce head towards the abandoned mine with Yu and Grim to search for a magestone. Just when they thought they were alone in the mine, a terrifying voice echoes from the depths of the darkness.

title: A Desperate Heart
overview: Ace barges into Yu and Grim's dorm late at night, wearing a strange collar. Following Yu's suggestion, they head to Heartslabyul House the next day, but a surprising encounter in the renowned rose garden thwarts their plans.

title: A Mealtime Chat
overview: The residents of Heartslabyul House are growing increasingly unhappy with their housewarden's strict rule-abiding ways. Meanwhile, Ace must find a way to convince the housewarden to remove the collar around his neck.

title: An Army of One
overview: Ace notices Riddle's happy mood as the perfectly prepared unbirthday party begins. Seeing this as his chance to get the awful collar removed, Ace approaches Riddle with the chestnut tart he baked. However, Riddle's unexpected reaction turns the situation from bad to worse.

title: A Duel Ill-Advised
overview: Ace and Deuce's duel with Riddle becomes the catalyst that unleashes all the dissatisfaction of the other Heartslabyul residents. However, the unexpected backlash shocks Riddle so deeply that he begins to undergo an ominous change.

title: Finale for Heartslabyul
overview: Riddle's magic begins to rampage along with the explosion of his emotions. Realizing the danger everyone is in, Headmage Crowley orders everyone to evacuate. However, Ace, Deuce, Yu, and Grim are determined to face Riddle and his raging magic.
